name: deepcore_office
description: The Deep Office (q.side_office slot 51, Deepcore SQ4 - the scrubbing-artifact set-piece): the Abandoned Branch Office prop body sealed down the played-out shaft at y~40. No cash, no battle - the beats are the oblique recognition seed (the unscrubbed founder portrait, never named) and the Gaviota manifest hook. Chain: deepcore_restructure_started is injected as the register context (it is the reason to be down the shaft; the reserve scenario earns it for real), then the default entry's read_button sets seen_deep_office (the Dark-Urge stir announce), the REVISITED entry (prio 20) must preempt on re-open with the manifest button still live, taking the manifest sets took_deep_manifest (aqua Gaviota announce), and a third open shows the revisited entry with the manifest button now hidden by its not_tag (absence is not assertable headless - the stable Seal-it-again label is the anchor). Both quest tags are one-way latches left set BY DESIGN (seen_deep_office closes the q.side_office line); the preamble resets them for re-runs.
_probe_note: The office coord is the character file's own PLACEHOLDER - authored y=40 with an explicit 'confirm at placement; if absent, relocate to a surface old-assay-office' note. MUST be ground/void-probed (and the sealed-wing build confirmed to exist) before the first live run; the safari buried-y64 incident is the precedent.

steps.comment: -- preamble: close any leftover dialog, reset the two quest latches (idempotent re-runs), and inject the register context tag --

steps.comment_: the q.side_office stage gates on it; idempotent - deepcore_reserve earns and resets it in its own runs

steps.comment: -- tp BEFORE the hostile sweep (kill no-ops in unloaded chunks): y~40 is cave darkness outside any safe zone, so clear the room and keep the hardcore player alive through the reading --

steps.comment_: latch settle - the prop body spawns within 40b of the placement

steps.comment: -- beat 1: the sealed office. say[] rotates 2 lines, so assert the stable read_button label; reading sets seen_deep_office + the Dark-Urge stir announce (dark_gray, single color run) --

steps.wait_chat: My hand knows this motion better than I do

steps.comment: -- beat 2: re-open - the revisited entry (prio 20) must preempt the default; say pair covered any-of; the manifest button is still live (took_deep_manifest not yet set) --

expect_screen_text: The office is as you left it. Sealed air, a desk, an unsigned charter, and the portrait nobody came back to take down. The brass plate under it is scratched to bare metal. Whoever this was, they were somebody once.

Still sealed, still airless, still hung with the one portrait the scrubbers never reached - full colour, the plate beneath it scratched blank. The face in the frame keeps your eyes longer than a stranger should. You do not know why. You do not like that you do not know why.

steps.wait_chat: The manifest routes the reserve down to Gaviota Port

steps.comment: -- beat 3: third open - still the revisited entry; the manifest button is now hidden by its not_tag gate (button ABSENCE is not assertable headless - the evidence screenshot carries it; the stable leave label anchors the entry) --

-- cleanup: seen_deep_office + took_deep_manifest are one-way quest latches left set BY DESIGN (they close the sidebar line); deepcore_restructure_started stays for the reserve chain, whose own scenario resets it --
